x-enumeration-literals.name: Reward Earn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where rewards or points are granted based on eligible activities (e.g., purchases, usage).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Earn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where interest is accrued or credited on balances held in an account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bonus Earn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where additional rewards or incentives are granted, often as part of promotions or campaigns.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cashback Earn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where a percentage of spending is returned to the customer as monetary value or credit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Referral Earn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where rewards are granted for referring new customers or participants.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Milestone Earn Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where rewards are earned upon reaching predefined thresholds or milestones.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that modifies earned amounts due to corrections, reversals, or recalculations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Earn Expiry Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that removes or expires earned value if not used within a defined period.
